intended_use: AI Segmentation uses CT images to segment patient anatomy for use in radiation therapy treatment planning. AI Segmentation utilizes a pre-defined set of organ structures in the following regions: head
intended_use_full: AI Segmentation uses CT images to segment patient anatomy for use in radiation therapy treatment planning. AI Segmentation utilizes a pre-defined set of organ structures in the following regions: head and neck, thorax, pelvis, abdomen. Segmentation results are subject to review and editing by qualified, expert radiation therapy treatment planners.
